race.comment: EXOTIQUE MISS (5) took on the boys in open company when fresh from a spell over this trip at Eagle Farm last start and didn't finish too far away. Strips fitter and only goes up 1kg today. Beaten just 2.6 lengths in a Group 1 Tatts Tiara last prep so she has the class to take this out. GOSPEL GIRL (9) settled closer to the pace last time and held on well for third in a return to form over this distance at Eagle Farm. Live chance but will need a bit of luck from the tricky gate. CONSIDERED (1) made it five wins on the trot, and three this prep, when she dug deep to score in a Coffs Harbour NSW Country Championship qualifier over 1400m recently. The stable will have one eye on the final at Randwick on 4 April but this is a nice lead up race. ZOUBABY (8) gave the smart Taltarni Fields a fright at Doomben last start. Nicely drawn and should be about the mark.
